LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_AP.label: 20x128mm Oerlikon (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_AP.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_Incendiary.label: 20x128mm Oerlikon (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_Incendiary.descrip: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_HE.label: 20x128mm Oerlikon (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_HE.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_Sabot.label: 20x128mm Oerlikon (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x128mmOerlikon_Sabot.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_20x128mmOerlikon_AP.label: 20x128mm Oerlikon bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x128mmOerlikon_Incendiary.label: 20mm Oerlikon bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x128mmOerlikon_HE.label: 20mm Oerlikon bullet (AP-HE)
